title: metathelypteris decipiens
intro: Metathelypteris decipiens, also known as the False Ostrich Fern, is a type of fern found in the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Metathelypteris decipiens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, by drying the fronds and leaves to make a decoction or infusion.
